text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mayano Top Gun's debut approaching, we
try various training methods.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being the genius she is, she's able to master new
tactics and movements one after the other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I rack my brain trying to find ways
to challenge her.
